memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
' The three wives, and the issue of Sir John Arderne, were as follows : —
I. Alice, daughter of Sir Hugh Venables, of Kinderton, contracted wife in 1 Ed. II, 1307-8, as by the settlements of Alvanley …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Wasteneys於1326年出生在英國爾阿爾萬利時，她的父親William de Wasteneys37歲，母親Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton35歲。她於1341年與John de Arderne在英國斯塔福爾奧德利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1394年12月23日在英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Wasteneys于1326年出生在英国爾阿爾萬利时，她的父亲William de Wasteneys37岁，母亲Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton35岁。她于1341年与John de Arderne在英国斯塔福爾奧德利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1394年12月23日在英国英格兰爾阿爾德福德享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wasteneys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from the Norman French pronunciation of le Gâtinais (formerly Gastinois), a province occupying parts of the modern Seine-et-Marne and Loiret.

variants.name: Westney
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Westan-ig, from westan, west, and ig, an island, meaning a Western island

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Wasteneys was born in 1326, in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, her father, William de Wasteneys, was 37 and her mother, Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton, was 35. She married John de Arderne in 1341, in Audley, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 23 December 1394, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Wasteneys est née en 1326, à Alvanley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Wasteneys, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John de Arderne en 1341, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 décembre 1394, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Wasteneys 1326 in Alvanley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Wasteneys 37 und ihre Mutter Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton 35. Sie hat 1341 in Audley, Staffordshire, England John de Arderne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Dezember 1394 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Wasteneys è nata il nel 1326 nel Alvanley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William de Wasteneys, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato John de Arderne nel 1341, nel Audley, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 dicembre 1394, nel Aldford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Wasteneysが1326年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルヴァンリーで生まれた時，父William de Wasteneysは37歳，母Cecily Arderne Lady of Eltonは35歳であった。1341年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーでJohn de Arderneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1394年12月23日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Wasteneys(이)가 1326년 영국 체실르 앨반리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Wasteneys(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1341년 영국 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 John de Arderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1394년 12월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알드퍼드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Wasteneys nasceu em 1326, em Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Wasteneys, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Arderne em 1341, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1394, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Wasteneys родилась в 1326 г. в местности алванли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Wasteneys было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Arderne Lady of Elton, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Arderne в 1341 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 декабря 1394 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

Se casó con John de Arderne en 1341, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1394, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
